creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm curious, what do you call 'compilied binary' in connection with WAF? 

JFY: 

build8#file waf-svn 
waf-svn: a python script text executable 

I can agree, with certain extend, that some people may not need Python  
bindings for tdb, but Python is required to run WAF(which, in fact, is not 
used by 1.2.1, but by 1.2.9 it is).
